item.title: Today was quite an interesting day
item.description:
Hello world!!

Subject: Fiddling around Firefox(Android) source codes

Today while fiddling around with Firefox(Android) source codes, I came across a location.service.mozilla url, which I assume is for location based searches or something similar. I tried replacing the url with 0.0.0.0 and the recompiling and installing. Well, starting the app leads to an instant crash, however when reverted back to location.service, the app starts normally. This I found quite odd. But, then again, maybe I could be missing something here, maybe some variables are predefined across files that are somehow linked. Will try to fiddle with the codes more.

Meanwhile, I tried decompiling chrome(Android) and was unable to do so. Maybe they made their app to be resistant to decompiling software. This is the very reason why I like open-source apps, under GPL license, anyone could edit the application and use it to their need!.

Love and support open-source, yeah that should be the motto!! ^..^

Love and support open-source and I hope you have a wonderful day!!

Visit samiuljoy.github.io.

item.title: Just got familiar with gopher and gemini
item.description:
Hello world!!

Subject: Got myself familiar with Gopher and gemini

Gopher and Gemini are two internet protocols that existed back in 1965. People used these prior to http/s web standard. It eventually went into abyss. Nevertheless, just got introduced to it through fediverse, and thought it'd be a good idea to check it out. I seem to enjoy it so far. Also got to know couple of people from there and followed them on fediverse. I've came across pretty decent people on gemini and gopher. Worth checking out.

It's good to know that something alternative and more simplistic exists out there aside from the modern web, aside from the crowd, and it never hurts to check these alternative platforms out. You never know, might end up liking it ^..^

Have a wonderful day!!

samiuljoy.github.io.

item.title: My first rss post!!
item.description:
Hello world!! This is my first rss feed post!!!

Subject: Today I customized an app for the first time.

Hello world!! For the first time in my life I was able to extract the source codes from an app, edit some color properties, customized it to my liking, and repacked the app and signed it and installed it and voila!! There was my app!! It feels good ^_^

The name of the app was overchan, just incase anyone wondering ^_^

Have a wonderful day!!

Visit samiuljoy.github.io.
